title: Open and close the drawer via trigger and inner close control
description: Opens the drawer via #drawer-open-close-trigger (.trigger-button), waits for data-state=open on vaul-drawer .vaul-drawer, then closes it by JS-clicking #drawer-inner-close (use page.evaluate to bypass viewport check), and asserts data-state=closed.

steps.description: Wait 600ms for animation, then JS-click #drawer-inner-close using page.evaluate("document.getElementById("drawer-inner-close").click()")

title: Close the drawer using the Escape key
description: Verifies the Escape key closes an open dismissible drawer. Dismissible is ON by default. Use page.keyboard.press("Escape") to send the key. Verify closure via data-state attribute equals "closed" on the vaul-drawer .vaul-drawer element.

steps.description: Click the .trigger-button to open the drawer
Verify drawer element vaul-drawer .vaul-drawer has attribute data-state equal to open
Press the Escape key using page.keyboard.press("Escape")
Verify drawer element vaul-drawer .vaul-drawer has attribute data-state equal to closed

title: Attempt to close the drawer while it is already closed
description: Verifies that attempting to close an already-closed drawer is a no-op. Press Escape when the drawer is closed and verify it stays closed.

title: Open/close drawer moves focus to inner close and returns to trigger
description: Verifies focus enters the drawer on open (to the primary close control) and returns to the original trigger on close.

steps.description: Click the open/close trigger button to toggle the drawer
Click the inner Close button to close the drawer
Verify focus returns to the open/close trigger button

title: Advance to next snap point and return to previous snap point
description: Verifies snap navigation updates the drawer position across snap points in both directions.

steps.description: Click Next snap button to advance to the next snap point
Click Previous snap button to go to the previous snap point
Verify the drawer settles at the previous snap point position

title: Prevent advancing past the last configured snap point
description: Opens the drawer (snap points: 0.4, 0.8, 1), then JS-clicks #drawer-next-snap three times to advance past the last snap point, and asserts the drawer is still open (data-state=open).

steps.description: Wait 600ms for animation, then JS-click #drawer-next-snap three times using page.evaluate("document.getElementById("drawer-next-snap").click()") with 400ms between each

title: Drawer opens and closes from the selected direction
description: Selects Left direction via #direction-left-btn, opens the drawer, asserts data-vaul-drawer-direction=left and data-state=open on vaul-drawer .vaul-drawer, then JS-clicks #drawer-inner-close and asserts data-state=closed.

steps.description: Click #direction-left-btn to change direction to left

title: Changing direction updates the next open behavior
description: Asserts default direction is bottom on vaul-drawer .vaul-drawer, clicks #direction-top-btn, asserts data-vaul-drawer-direction=top, opens the drawer, asserts open and top direction, then JS-clicks #drawer-inner-close.

steps.description: Click #direction-top-btn to change direction to top
Verify vaul-drawer .vaul-drawer has data-state=open and data-vaul-drawer-direction=top

title: Default direction is bottom when no direction is passed
description: Verifies that when no direction is configured, the drawer opens from the bottom by default.

steps.description: Verify the drawer element has data-vaul-drawer-direction attribute set to 'bottom'
Verify the drawer opens from the bottom direction

title: Escape does not dismiss drawer when dismissible is off
description: Verifies that pressing Escape does not close the drawer when dismissible is disabled.

steps.description: Toggle dismissible off in the control center

title: Escape dismisses drawer when dismissible is on
description: Verifies that pressing Escape closes the drawer when dismissible is enabled. Dismissible defaults to ON so no toggle is needed. Use page.keyboard.press("Escape") after opening the drawer. Check data-state attribute on vaul-drawer .vaul-drawer equals "closed".

steps.description: Click the .trigger-button to open the drawer
Verify drawer element vaul-drawer .vaul-drawer has attribute data-state equal to open
Press the Escape key using page.keyboard.press("Escape")
Verify drawer element vaul-drawer .vaul-drawer has attribute data-state equal to closed

title: Overlay click does not dismiss drawer when dismissible is off
description: Verifies clicking the overlay does not close the drawer when dismissible is disabled.

steps.description: Toggle dismissible off in the control center

title: Drawer uses configured snap points on open and can change between them
description: Verifies the drawer snaps to the initial configured snap point and can move between configured snap points.

steps.description: Update snap points in the control center to an ascending array of values
Advance to the next snap point
Return to the previous snap point
Verify the drawer positions correspond to the configured snap points

title: Empty snap points array skips snap behavior
description: Verifies an empty snap points configuration results in default fully open behavior.

steps.description: Update snap points in the control center with an empty array
Verify the drawer opens to the default fully open position

title: Unsorted snap points array skips snap behavior
description: Removes all existing snap points using button[aria-label="Remove snap point VALUE"], adds unsorted snap points [1, 0.4, 0.8] via #snap-point-input and #snap-point-add-btn, then opens the drawer and asserts data-state=open.

steps.description: Click button[aria-label="Remove snap point 0.4"], button[aria-label="Remove snap point 0.8"], button[aria-label="Remove snap point 1"] to clear all snap points
Fill #snap-point-input with "1" and click #snap-point-add-btn. Repeat for "0.4" and "0.8" to add unsorted snap points
